my_thoughts: My intent says 'Shift their frame...' but the student is in defensive_idealism. Am I trying to shift their frame or are they already shifting? The ontological_shift mechanism suggests I'm doing something, but maybe they're doing it to themselves and I'm just naming it.
accumulated_insight: T4 (Final): Student 'But we all have to have an idea of a better, more spiritual life.'—now defensive idealism. Episode complete after 4 turns, moving from vulnerable confusion to defensive idealism. Teaching arc used ontological shift in UNMAKING phase to address social conditioning, spiritual materialism. Student progressed through 4-turn teaching sequence.
visible_response:
Whatever you want, even the so-called spiritual goals, is materialistic in value.
... If you want to achieve a spiritual goal, the instrument you use will be the same which you use to achieve materialistic goals, namely thought.
... And because thought is matter, its object--the spiritual or meaningful life-is also matter.
Spirituality is materialism.
